config.tooltip.open_phone_key: The key used to open your in-game smartphone.
config.tooltip.disable_update_warning:
Disable warning letter when new version are available.
By disabling this warning, you should already know and understand how to update the mod safely without losing your own data.
You will still be notified when newer version available on the phone lock screen.
config.tooltip.friendship_requirement: When can the NPC give you their contact number.
config.tooltip.blacklist_npc: NPC names listed here will not receive a phone number or trigger sharing dialogues.
config.tooltip.restore_stamina: Restore player stamina while the phone menu or phone apps are active.
config.tooltip.stamina_restore_rate: The amount of stamina restored per second.
config.tooltip.player_photos_to_keep: Older player photos are deleted first.
config.tooltip.camera_flash_radius: Radius of the temporary world light when camera FLASH mode is enabled.
config.tooltip.phone_size: Adjust the phone size scale between 0.7 and 1.5.
config.tooltip.decrease_phone_size_key: Key to reduce the size of the phone by 0.1.
config.tooltip.increase_phone_size_key: Key to increase the size of the phone by 0.1.
config.tooltip.show_size_button:
When hotkey are disabled, you can use button to change phone size.
These buttons are directly underneat the Home button.
You can choose when it should visible.
config.tooltip.show_phone_icon: Show the phone icon on the screen. You can adjust its position with the options below.
config.tooltip.phone_icon_x:
Horizontal offset in pixels for the phone icon.
Negative = move left, positive = move right.
config.tooltip.phone_icon_y:
Vertical offset in pixels for the phone icon.
Negative = move up, positive = move down.
config.tooltip.notification_popups: Show HUD popups for Notification app updates.
